task_completion_criteria.technical_section_text: Microservice migration is 78% complete with 14 of 18 services now running on the new Kubernetes cluster. Average API latency dropped from 340ms to 112ms after the migration of the payment and auth services. API versioning strategy has been finalized: all v1 endpoints will be deprecated by June 30. Load testing on the new cluster shows 99.97% uptime under peak simulated traffic.
task_completion_criteria.customer_section_text: Customer adoption of the new dashboard reached 62% in March, up from 41% in February. NPS score improved from 34 to 42 following the onboarding flow redesign. Churn risk flagged for 3 enterprise accounts due to delayed feature requests; account team is engaged. Net new ARR for March was $1.2M against a target of $1.0M.
task_completion_criteria.compliance_section_text: SOC2 Type II audit fieldwork begins April 7; all evidence packets are staged and ready for review. GDPR data mapping exercise is 95% complete with remaining gaps in the analytics pipeline. No open compliance incidents as of March 15.
task_completion_criteria.executive_section_text: Project Atlas is on track for Q2 launch with 94% milestone completion.
task_completion_criteria.action_items_section_text:
- Finalize load test report and share results with engineering leads by March 28
- Update sales deck with March adoption metrics by April 1
- Submit SOC2 evidence packets to auditor by April 5
- Schedule executive review meeting for week of April 7
